title: Keyboard Place Fix
description: Fixes inventory right-click behavior for external Keyboard Place setups without changing core KBP functionality.
body:
# Keyboard Place Fix

is a client-side Fabric mod for players who already use **Keyboard Place (KBP)** with external mouse/software remapping.

It restores vanilla right-click behavior in inventories while keeping your normal KBP gameplay flow.

## What this mod fixes

When KBP is used via external remap, inventory right-click actions can fail (or feel inconsistent), such as:

- Splitting stacks (64 -> 32)
- Right-click interactions in chests and other containers
  
This mod fixes those inventory/container interactions.
# ![KB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e1182d457acb67de3ee1f5a06a2713ecc483d2f.gif)-![KB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a86530479cd0e07d9ee83191da72ff6d57b2b2ef.gif)-![KB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a141a4f37b91f19ef826ab34003dfa60325ff36e.gif)
## What this mod does **not** change

- It does **not** change core KBP functionality
- It does **not** generate KBP by itself

## Features

- Virtual right-click keybind (default: `.`)
- Works in inventory, chests, and storage containers
- Optional Mod Menu config screen
- Lightweight, client-side only

## Requirements

- KBP enabled externally (mouse software/remapper)
  ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f68cbb58d0f52eb9305981004ed2314f0415d476_0.webp)

## Usage

1. Install the mod in your `mods` folder.
2. Bind `Virtual Right Click` to your preferred key (or keep default).
3. Use your KBP setup normally.

## Important warning

This mod only works as intended if **Keyboard Place is already enabled externally** with your mouse/software remapper.
